name: McKinsey PPT Design
description_en: Generate consultant-grade, McKinsey-style PowerPoint decks from scratch via a python-pptx engine with high-level layout methods and built-in guard rails.
description_zh: 通过 python-pptx 引擎从零生成咨询级、麦肯锡风格的 PPT,内置高层版式方法与排版护栏。
long_en: MckEngine wraps python-pptx with cover/donut/timeline and dozens more methods across structure, data, and storytelling, enforcing consistent typography and spacing to avoid file corruption.
long_zh: MckEngine 封装 python-pptx,提供封面/环形图/时间线等覆盖结构、数据与叙事的数十种方法,统一字体与间距以规避文件损坏。
sec_note_en: Requires `pip install python-pptx lxml` and runs Python locally; some cover-image features call an external image model.
sec_note_zh: 需 `pip install python-pptx lxml` 并在本地运行 Python;部分封面配图功能会调用外部图像模型。
